description: Claudish unified proxy — all models via models.myia.io
notes: Routes ALL models through the claudish proxy (Docker via models.myia.io)
All providers also accessible by explicit name: claude-opus-4-7, glm-5.1, qwen3.6-35b-a3b, etc.
GLM models use z.ai keys stored in ~/.claudish/config.json
Claude models use pass-through auth or stored ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from config
vLLM models use custom endpoint stored in config
ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN = proxy key, sent as authorization: Bearer by Claude Code
Compaction: 90%/200K — safe for all models (z.ai 137K real, vLLM varies, Anthropic 200K+)
